arts.sum: Ruben Amorim was appointed to replace Erik ten Hag as head coach last month and results have been mixed - so far - during his short time with Man Utd.

arts.ttl: ‘Big surprise’ as PSG ‘seriously consider’ signing Wolves player in January
arts.sum: Matheus Cunha has impressed for Wolverhampton Wanderers this season despite their struggles in the Premier League. The forward has managed nine goals and three assists from 17 league games and his displays haven’t gone unnoticed.
